name: Café Aroma
tagline: The classic Aroma with a modern soul.

reviews.author: Andy A.
reviews.text: Best coffee, service impeccable. Clean with a simple ambiance. Everything prepared to order.

reviews.author: Sarah M.
reviews.text: My iced caramel macchiato was delicious and my bf LOVED their croissants!! A must for any coffee lover visiting the area!

reviews.author: Travel Guest
reviews.text: Superb pastries and the freddo espresso — so much better than the lunch we had in mind. The owner was very welcoming.

reviews.author: Family Visit
reviews.text: Espresso and lattes were perfect, and all the sweet treats were fantastic. Will definitely stop back after our next aquarium visit.

reviews.author: Regular
reviews.text: Cakes and brownies are super good. Very cozy place. Staff super nice. Paul won't let you leave without trying the gelato — AMAZING!

values.title: Lavazza Fresh Ground
values.desc: Premium Italian coffee beans, ground fresh for every single cup.

values.title: Copper-Filtered Water
values.desc: All drinks made with water filtered through copper pipes for purity.

values.title: Organic Milk Options
values.desc: Whole, 2%, skim, almond, oat & coconut — all organic.

values.title: Organic Sugar & Stevia
values.desc: Sweetness without compromise. Natural alternatives always available.

values.title: GMO Free Products
values.desc: Everything we serve is thoughtfully sourced and free of GMOs.

values.title: Made to Order
values.desc: Nothing sits under a lamp. Every drink and bite crafted on request.
